personal.preferred_title: Program Manager II | Data & Analytics, SQL, Dashboards & Cross-Functional Delivery

summary: Data-driven technical program and analytics leader with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience coordinating complex data initiatives, building reporting workflows, translating stakeholder needs into actionable metrics, and driving delivery across engineering, operations, and business teams. Strong hands-on background in SQL, Python, data analysis, dashboards, process improvement, risk tracking, production support, stakeholder communication, and technical documentation. Experienced owning end-to-end execution from requirements and planning through delivery, validation, optimization, and continuous improvement.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Led data-driven capacity and analytics initiatives that translated infrastructure, application, and business stakeholder needs into reporting outputs, dashboards, and forecasting workflows.
Built automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Created executive-facing dashboards and reports using SQL, Python, Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Oracle, Redshift, and enterprise telemetry data.
Partnered with engineering, operations, and leadership stakeholders to define metrics, clarify requirements, track risks, resolve data quality issues, and improve recurring reporting processes.
Developed validation, reconciliation, and troubleshooting routines to improve confidence in data used for planning, operational decisions, and executive communication.
Managed ambiguity across complex technical workflows by breaking problems into scoped deliverables, documenting assumptions, and driving recurring reporting improvements to closure.
Automated manual data preparation and reporting activities, improving repeatability, reducing operational friction, and enabling more consistent decision support.
Produced technical documentation, operational procedures, and knowledge-transfer materials so teams could understand, maintain, and extend data processes.
Used AI-assisted workflows and structured prompt-driven automation to accelerate documentation, job analysis, artifact generation, and repeatable delivery processes.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating hospitality systems.
Translated raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering and business stakeholders.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboarding, transaction tracing, and production troubleshooting.
Collaborated with technical teams during monitoring upgrades and maintained reporting continuity through a Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 cutover.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as senior technical liaison across application, infrastructure, and client teams for enterprise monitoring and performance analytics initiatives.
Supported a large enterprise monitoring environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Designed dashboards, SLA thresholds, alerts, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created documentation, onboarding procedures, training materials, and repeatable support workflows for distributed technical teams.
Built Perl and Korn Shell scripts to automate recurring performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify throughput limits, database bottlenecks, thread pressure, heap usage, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Documented performance baselines, test findings, and release-risk indicators used by engineering teams for production readiness decisions.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing and troubleshooting.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration workstream for a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting mission-critical transaction volume.
Coordinated validation, schema conversion, performance optimization, and migration-readiness activities across large transactional datasets.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation tooling to verify migration correctness and support phased cutover decisions.
Optimized database access and transaction processing, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Collaborated with QA, development, operations, and business stakeholders to resolve production issues and improve release reliability.
Improved billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end structured workflow using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers to score jobs, generate tailored artifacts, track applications, and reduce manual decision-making friction.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting platform that transformed enterprise telemetry into validated forecasting datasets, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and produced capacity bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, analytics access patterns, and reporting-ready data structures.
